description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Snapshots that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that builds snapshots across multiple platforms including Linux x86_64, Linux aarch64, Windows x86_64, MacOS x86_64, MacOS aarch64, and Windows-VC x64. For each job, check out the repository with full history and then perform a build using a custom action in the .github/actions directory.
